summary: Frontend voice feature testing for AI Richard chat widget. Voice toggle, Free Voice, and Premium Voice UI buttons all work correctly. CRITICAL: Premium Voice backend TTS endpoint returns 500 error due to incorrect API key usage.

critical.issue: TTS endpoint returns 500 error. The tts.py route uses native OpenAI client with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY directly, but this key is meant for Emergent's LiteLLM integration, not direct OpenAI API calls. Error: 'Incorrect API key provided: sk-emerg******************e7b5'

integration_issues.issue: Frontend correctly calls /api/tts/tts endpoint when Premium Voice is selected, but backend returns 500 error. Free Voice (browser TTS) works correctly.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix /app/backend/routes/tts.py - The TTS endpoint uses native OpenAI client with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY, but this key is for Emergent's LiteLLM integration. Either: (1) Use emergentintegrations SDK like ai_richard.py does, or (2) Add a separate OPENAI_API_KEY for direct OpenAI TTS calls
OPTIONAL: Add data-testid attributes to AIRichard.js for better automated testing (voice-toggle-btn, free-voice-btn, premium-voice-btn, stop-speaking-btn)
critical_code_review_comments: tts.py line 11: Uses OpenAI(api_key=os.environ.get('EMERGENT_LLM_KEY')) - EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is not a valid OpenAI API key
ai_richard.py correctly uses emergentintegrations.llm.openai.LlmChat with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY - TTS should follow similar pattern or use different key

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend testing skipped per request
success_rate.frontend: 90% - All UI features work, Premium Voice integration blocked by backend error

context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice feature UI is fully functional. Free Voice (browser speechSynthesis) works. Premium Voice UI works but backend TTS endpoint fails with 401/500 due to API key issue. Once backend is fixed, Premium Voice should work.

voice_toggle_button.details: Voice toggle in chat header enables/disables voice output correctly

voice_quality_selector_visibility.details: Voice quality selector (Free/Premium buttons) appears when voice is enabled, hides when disabled

free_voice_button.details: Free Voice button is visible, selectable, shows correct styling when selected (bg-gray-700)

premium_voice_button.details: Premium Voice button is visible, selectable, shows correct styling when selected (gradient purple-blue)

free_voice_tts.details: Free Voice uses browser speechSynthesis API - no console errors

premium_voice_tts.details: Premium Voice correctly calls /api/tts/tts but backend returns 500 error due to invalid API key

voice_selection_persistence.details: Voice quality selection persists when toggling voice on/off

visual_indication.details: Selected voice button has distinct styling - Free Voice: dark gray, Premium Voice: purple gradient

premium_voice_500_error.symptom: Premium Voice TTS returns 500 Internal Server Error
premium_voice_500_error.root_cause: tts.py uses native OpenAI client with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (sk-emergent-...) which is not a valid OpenAI API key. This key is meant for Emergent's LiteLLM integration, not direct OpenAI API calls.
reproduction_steps: 5. Observe console error: 'Speech error: Error: TTS API failed'
6. Backend logs show: 'TTS Error: Error code: 401 - Incorrect API key provided'
premium_voice_500_error.mitigation: Modify /app/backend/routes/tts.py to either: (1) Use emergentintegrations SDK for TTS if available, or (2) Add a separate OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable for direct OpenAI TTS API calls
